data.title: The earnings growth of the seven major US stocks slowed down, and the rise of the S&P 500 index was threatened
data.description: The seven largest companies in the U.S. have boosted earnings growth and stock returns for the S&P 500, accounting for about a third of the benchmark index. More than half of the index's gains over the past two years have come from these companies, but their profit growth is slowing as spending grows. In terms of forward price-to-earnings ratios, the Big Seven are 40% premium to the S&P 500 as a whole, so these concerns pose a threat to their high valuations. This premium level is already narrowing, below the peak of 70% in 2023. Industry research data shows that the year-on-year growth rate of earnings of these giants peaked at the end of 2023 and is expected to slow for the fifth consecutive quarter. Kristian Heugh, manager of the Morgan Stanley Global Opportunities Fund, said the year-on-year growth in earnings of the Big Seven is "substantially" declining, while other components of the S&P 500 are improving. (Jinshi)

data.title: Atlanta Fed GDPNow model predicts that the US GDP growth rate in the first quarter of 2025 will be 2.9%
data.description: The Atlanta Fed's GDPNow model expects U.S. GDP growth to be 2.9% in the first quarter of 2025, compared with a previous forecast of 3.9%.

data.title: Atlanta Fed GDPNow Model Adjusts U.S. Q1 2025 GDP Growth Forecast
data.description: According to Odaily, the Atlanta Federal Reserve's GDPNow model has revised its forecast for the United States' first-quarter GDP growth in 2025. The updated projection estimates a growth rate of 2.9%, down from the previous forecast of 3.9%.

data.title: The U.S. FDIC is re-evaluating its regulation of cryptocurrency activities, and the original regulatory warning has been deleted
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to crypto KOL MartyParty, the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) announced today that it is actively re-evaluating its regulatory approach to cryptocurrency-related activities. This includes replacing Financial Institution Letter (FIL) 16-2022 and providing a path for institutions to participate in cryptocurrency and blockchain-related activities while adhering to the principles of security and soundness. 
This information was emphasized in a statement by Acting Chairman Travis Hill, indicating that the FDIC has changed in regulating banks involved in cryptocurrency activities. This means: banks can custody customers' cryptocurrencies and they will be insured by the FDIC. The Biden administration's Choke Point FIL 16-2022 letter has been withdrawn and replaced. 
MartyParty commented: The original FIL-16-2022 letter link has been deleted and displays a 404 error. The FDIC is deleting all evidence related to its politically motivated policy against cryptocurrency.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,800 USDT with a 5.58% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 05, 2025, 22:15 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,800 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,802.100098 USDT, with a narrowed 5.58% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: US SEC transfers crypto lawyers involved in Ripple, Coinbase cases to IT department
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has reassigned former Deputy Chief of the Crypto Assets and Cyberspace Division and crypto litigator Jorge Tenreiro to its Computer Systems Management (IT) Division. Tenreiro worked at the SEC for more than 11 years, starting as an enforcement attorney before serving as the head of the agency's Crypto Enforcement Division from October 2022 to November 2024, according to his LinkedIn information. Tenreiro was involved in several high-profile SEC enforcement cases against cryptocurrency companies, such as Ripple and Coinbase. The SEC has reportedly scaled back its crypto enforcement division as it takes a less hostile stance toward the crypto industry since President Donald Trump took office in 2025.

data.title: The probability of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in March is 83.5%.
data.description: According to CME's "Fed Watch", the probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in March is 83.5%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 16.5%. The probability of maintaining the current interest rate unchanged by May is 59.2%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 36.0%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 4.8%.

data.title: Cboe BZX Exchange to Launch Ethereum Spot ETF Options Trading
data.description: Cboe BZX Exchange has proposed to amend Rule 19.3 to allow the exchange to launch options trading on an Ethereum spot ETF, a “competing filing” based on a similar proposal filed by the New York Stock Exchange’s American division that is currently awaiting approval from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing specifically mentions the Bitwise Ethereum ETF, Grayscale Ethereum Trust, Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust, and “any trust that holds Ether.” Cboe BZX wrote in the filing: “The Exchange believes that offering options on the Ethereum Fund will benefit investors by providing them with an additional, relatively low-cost investment vehicle to gain exposure to spot Ether, as well as a hedging tool to meet their investment needs in Ether products and positions.”

data.title: MicroStrategy changes its name to Strategy
data.description: MicroStrategy Incorporated (NASDAQ: $MSTR) today announced that it is now operating under the name Strategy™, according to Bloomberg. Strategy is the world’s first and largest Bitcoin Treasury, the largest independently listed business intelligence company, and a component of the Nasdaq 100 Index. BlockBeats Note: No official statement has been received from Michael Saylor and this news is unconfirmed until he publicly announces it.
